stemHtml: According to Certification Specifications for Large Aeroplanes (CS-25), when an aeroplane needs to show compliance with the Emergency Evacuation requirements with an actual demonstration…

options.a: at least 10 infants, 2 years old or younger, must be carried by female passengers.
options.b: not more than 50% of the emergency exits in the sides of the fuselage may be used.
options.c: a full briefing on the procedures to be followed in the demonstration must be given to the passengers.
options.d: aisles and emergency exit access ways must be clear of all obstructions, to avoid injuries.
